title: linaria dalmatica var. tessala
intro: Linaria dalmatica var. tessala, also known as the Dalmatian toadflax, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Linaria dalmatica var. tessala include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
